The Velvet Noir Blindfold is an exceptional choice for **beginners** eager to dip their toes into the exciting world of sensory play. Primarily designed for **couples**, this blindfold excels at fostering deeper communication, trust, and vulnerability as partners navigate the experience together. ## Care & Cleaning

Maintaining the pristine condition and hygiene of your Velvet Noir Blindfold is simple and crucial for its longevity and your continued enjoyment. Due to its delicate velvet and satin materials, we recommend **hand washing only**. Use a small amount of mild, pH-neutral soap (such as baby shampoo or a gentle lingerie detergent) dissolved in lukewarm water. Gently swish the blindfold in the soapy water, focusing on areas that may have come into contact with skin oils or makeup. Avoid harsh scrubbing or twisting, which can damage the fabric fibers. Rinse thoroughly under cool, running water until all soap residue is gone. Gently press out excess water with a clean towel, then lay flat or hang to **air dry** away from direct sunlight or heat. Do not machine wash, tumble dry, iron, or use bleach, as these methods can severely damage the velvet, satin, and elastic components. Your safety and peace of mind are paramount at Dark Fantasy. At Dark Fantasy, we prioritize materials that are not only comfortable but also conducive to a clean and safe experience, ensuring that your focus remains on pleasure and connection, not on potential hygiene concerns. You'll find medical-grade silicone, high-quality vegan leather, and soft, non-irritating fabrics, all chosen for their durability, hygiene, and luxurious feel. *   **Longevity & Easy Maintenance:** Constructed with robust stitching and high-quality hardware, these items are built to last, and their non-porous nature makes cleaning simple and efficient.

## Who It's For

The BDSM Beginner — Starter Kit Gift Set is primarily designed for **beginners** and **couples** who are new to BDSM or wish to explore its facets together for the first time. While ideal for couples, individuals curious about self-exploration and sensation play will also find value in the kit's versatile contents. ## Care & Cleaning

Maintaining the hygiene and longevity of your BDSM Beginner — Starter Kit is crucial for safe and enjoyable play. All items in this set are made from non-porous materials, making cleaning straightforward.

*   **Silicone Items (Ball Gag):** Wash thoroughly with warm water and a mild, toy-friendly soap before and after each use. Air dry completely, or pat dry with a lint-free cloth. Medical-grade silicone is also boilable for sterilization; submerge in boiling water for 3-5 minutes, then allow to cool completely before handling.

*   **Fabric Items (Blindfold, Storage Bag):** Hand wash gently in cool water with a mild detergent. Rinse thoroughly and air dry flat. Avoid machine washing or harsh scrubbing to preserve the fabric's integrity.

Always ensure all items are completely dry before storing them in the provided bag to prevent mildew or material degradation. Proper care ensures your kit remains a safe and cherished part of your explorations for years to come.

Your safety and well-being are our highest priority at Dark Fantasy. The BDSM Beginner — Starter Kit Gift Set adheres to rigorous safety standards
